name: io.github.elgorro/aiquila-mcp
title: AIquila — Nextcloud MCP Server
description: MCP server for Nextcloud: file management, search, calendar, contacts, and system status.

environmentVariables.name: NEXTCLOUD_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of your Nextcloud instance (e.g. https://cloud.example.com)

environmentVariables.name: NEXTCLOUD_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Nextcloud app password (generate in Nextcloud Security settings)
